 128→public class IndentationRule :
 129→    StandardRule(
 130→        id = "indent",
 131→        visitorModifiers =
 132→            setOf(
 133→                VisitorModifier.RunAsLateAsPossible,
 134→                VisitorModifier.RunAfterRule(
 135→                    ruleId = FUNCTION_SIGNATURE_RULE_ID,
 136→                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 137→                ),
 138→                VisitorModifier.RunAfterRule(
 139→                    ruleId = TRAILING_COMMA_ON_CALL_SITE_RULE_ID,
 140→                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 141→                ),
 142→                VisitorModifier.RunAfterRule(
 143→                    ruleId = TRAILING_COMMA_ON_DECLARATION_SITE_RULE_ID,
 144→                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 145→                ),
 146→            ),
 147→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 148→            setOf(
 149→                CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 150→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 151→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 152→            ),
 153→    ) {
 154→    private var codeStyle = CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY.defaultValue
 155→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 156→
 157→    private var line = 1
 158→
 159→    private val indentContextStack: Deque<IndentContext> = LinkedList()
 160→
 161→    private lateinit var stringTemplateIndenter: StringTemplateIndenter
 162→
 163→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 164→        codeStyle = editorConfig[CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY]
 165→        indentConfig =
 166→            IndentConfig(
 167→                indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 168→                tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 169→            )
 170→        if (indentConfig.disabled) {
 171→            stopTraversalOfAST()
 172→        }
 173→    }
 174→
 175→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 176→        node: ASTNode,
 177→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 178→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 179→    ) {
 180→        if (node.isRoot()) {
 181→            // File should not start with a whitespace
 182→            node
 183→                .nextLeaf()
 184→                ?.takeIf { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
 185→                ?.let { whitespaceWithoutNewline ->
 186→                    emit(node.startOffset, "Unexpected indentation", true)
 187→                    if (autoCorrect) {
 188→                        whitespaceWithoutNewline.treeParent.removeChild(whitespaceWithoutNewline)
 189→                    }
 190→                }
 191→            indentContextStack.addLast(startNoIndentZone(node))
 192→        }
 193→
 194→        when {
 195→            node.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() -> {
 196→                line++
 197→                if (indentContextStack.peekLast()?.activated == false) {
 198→                    val lastIndentContext = indentContextStack.removeLast()
 199→                    indentContextStack.addLast(
 200→                        lastIndentContext.copy(activated = true),
 201→                    )
 202→                }
 203→                visitNewLineIndentation(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 204→            }
 205→
 206→            node.elementType == CLASS_BODY ||
 207→                node.elementType == CONTEXT_RECEIVER_LIST ||
 208→                node.elementType == LONG_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY ||
 209→                node.elementType == STRING_TEMPLATE ||
 210→                node.elementType == VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST ->
 211→                startIndentContext(
 212→                    fromAstNode = node,
 213→                    lastChildIndent = "",
 214→                )
 215→
 216→            node.elementType == SUPER_TYPE_CALL_ENTRY -> {
 217→                if (codeStyle == ktlint_official && node.isPartOfClassWithAMultilinePrimaryConstructor()) {
 218→                    // Contrary to the default IntelliJ IDEA formatter, indent the super type call entry so that it looks better in case it
 219→                    // is followed by another super type:
 220→                    //      class Foo(
 221→                    //          val bar1: Bar,
 222→                    //          val bar2: Bar,
 223→                    //      ) : FooBar(
 224→                    //              bar1,
 225→                    //              bar2
 226→                    //          ),
 227→                    //          BarFoo,
 228→                    startIndentContext(
 229→                        fromAstNode = node,
 230→                        childIndent = indentConfig.indent,
 231→                        activated = true,
 232→                    )
 233→                } else {
 234→                    startIndentContext(
 235→                        fromAstNode = node,
 236→                        lastChildIndent = "",
 237→                    )
 238→                }
 239→            }
 240→
 241→            node.elementType == VALUE_ARGUMENT ->
 242→                visitValueArgument(node)
 243→
 244→            node.elementType == SECONDARY_CONSTRUCTOR ->
 245→                visitSecondaryConstructor(node)
 246→
 247→            node.elementType == PARENTHESIZED ->
 248→                if (codeStyle == ktlint_official) {
 249→                    // Contrary to the IntelliJ IDEA default formatter, do not indent the closing RPAR
 250→                    startIndentContext(
 251→                        fromAstNode = node,
 252→                        lastChildIndent = "",
 253→                    )
 254→                } else if (node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != IF) {
 255→                    startIndentContext(node)
 256→                }
 257→
 258→            node.elementType == BINARY_WITH_TYPE ||
 259→                node.elementType == SUPER_TYPE_ENTRY ||
 260→                node.elementType == TYPE_ARGUMENT_LIST ||
 261→                node.elementType == TYPE_PARAMETER_LIST ||
 262→                node.elementType == USER_TYPE ||
 263→                node.elementType == IS_EXPRESSION ||
 264→                node.elementType == PREFIX_EXPRESSION ->
 265→                handleIsOrPrefixExpression(node)
 266→
 267→
 268→            node.elementType == DELEGATED_SUPER_TYPE_ENTRY ||
 269→                node.elementType == ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION ||
 270→                node.elementType == TYPE_REFERENCE ->
 271→                startIndentContext(
 272→                    fromAstNode = node,
 273→                    childIndent = "",
 274→                )
 275→
 276→            node.elementType == IF ->
 277→                visitIf(node)
 278→
 279→            node.elementType == LBRACE ->
 280→                visitLbrace(node)
 281→
 282→            node.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST &&
 283→                node.treeParent.elementType != FUNCTION_LITERAL ->
 284→                startIndentContext(
 285→                    fromAstNode = node,
 286→                    lastChildIndent = "",
 287→                )
 288→
 289→            node.elementType == LPAR &&
 290→                node.nextCodeSibling()?.elementType == CONDITION ->
 291→                visitLparBeforeCondition(node)
 292→
 293→            node.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER ->
 294→                visitValueParameter(node)
 295→
 296→            node.elementType == FUN ->
 297→                visitFun(node)
 298→
 299→            node.elementType == CLASS ->
 300→                visitClass(node)
 301→
 302→            node.elementType == OBJECT_DECLARATION ->
 303→                visitObjectDeclaration(node)
 304→
 305→            node.elementType == BINARY_EXPRESSION ->
 306→                visitBinaryExpression(node)
 307→
 308→            node.elementType in CHAINABLE_EXPRESSION -> {
 309→                if (codeStyle == ktlint_official &&
 310→                    node.elementType == DOT_QUALIFIED_EXPRESSION &&
 311→                    node.treeParent?.elementType == ARRAY_ACCESS_EXPRESSION &&
 312→                    node.treeParent?.treeParent?.elementType == CALL_EXPRESSION
 313→                ) {
 314→                    // Issue 1540: Deviate and fix from incorrect formatting in IntelliJ IDEA formatting and produce following:
 315→                    // val fooBar2 = foo
 316→                    //    .bar[0] {
 317→                    //        "foobar"
 318→                    //    }
 319→                    startIndentContext(
 320→                        fromAstNode = node.treeParent,
 321→                        toAstNode = node.treeParent.treeParent.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 322→                    )
 323→                } else if (node.prevCodeSibling().isElvisOperator()) {
 324→                    startIndentContext(node)
 325→                } else if (node.treeParent.elementType in CHAINABLE_EXPRESSION) {
 326→                    // Multiple dot qualified expressions and/or safe expression on the same line should not increase the indent level
 327→                } else {
 328→                    startIndentContext(node)
 329→                }
 330→            }
 331→
 332→            node.elementType == IDENTIFIER &&
 333→                node.treeParent.elementType == PROPERTY ->
 334→                visitIdentifierInProperty(node)
 335→
 336→            node.elementType == LITERAL_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY &&
 337→                node.nextCodeSibling()?.elementType == CLOSING_QUOTE ->
 338→                visitWhiteSpaceBeforeClosingQuote(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 339→
 340→            node.elementType == WHEN ->
 341→                visitWhen(node)
 342→
 343→            node.elementType == WHEN_ENTRY ->
 344→                visitWhenEntry(node)
 345→
 346→            node.elementType == WHERE_KEYWORD &&
 347→                node.nextCodeSibling()?.elementType == TYPE_CONSTRAINT_LIST ->
 348→                visitWhereKeywordBeforeTypeConstraintList(node)
 349→
 350→            node.elementType == KDOC ->
 351→                visitKdoc(node)
 352→
 353→            node.elementType == PROPERTY_ACCESSOR ||
 354→                node.elementType == TYPEALIAS ->
 355→                visitPropertyAccessor(node)
 356→
 357→            node.elementType == FOR ||
 358→                node.elementType == WHILE ->
 359→                visitConditionalLoop(node)
 360→
 361→            node.elementType == LBRACKET ->
 362→                visitLBracket(node)
 363→
 364→            node.elementType == NULLABLE_TYPE ->
 365→                visitNullableType(node)
 366→
 367→            node.elementType == DESTRUCTURING_DECLARATION ->
 368→                visitDestructuringDeclaration(node)
 369→
 370→            node.elementType == TRY ->
 371→                visitTryCatchFinally(node)
 372→
 373→            else -> {
 374→                LOGGER.trace { "No processing for ${node.elementType}: ${node.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()}" }
 375→            }
 376→        }
 377→    }
 378→
 379→    private fun ASTNode.isPartOfClassWithAMultilinePrimaryConstructor() =
 380→        parent { it.elementType == CLASS }
 381→            ?.findChildByType(PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR)
 382→            ?.textContains('\n') == true
 383→
 384→    private fun visitValueArgument(node: ASTNode) {
 385→        if (codeStyle == ktlint_official) {
 386→            // Deviate from standard IntelliJ IDEA formatting to allow formatting below:
 387→            //     val foo = foo(
 388→            //         parameterName =
 389→            //             "The quick brown fox "
 390→            //                .plus("jumps ")
 391→            //                .plus("over the lazy dog"),
 392→            //     )
 393→            startIndentContext(
 394→                fromAstNode = node,
 395→                lastChildIndent = "",
 396→            )
 397→        }
 398→    }
 399→
 400→    private fun visitSecondaryConstructor(node: ASTNode) {
 401→        node
 402→            .findChildByType(CONSTRUCTOR_DELEGATION_CALL)
 403→            ?.let { constructorDelegationCall ->
 404→                val fromAstNode = node.skipLeadingWhitespaceCommentsAndAnnotations()
 405→                val nextToAstNode =
 406→                    startIndentContext(
 407→                        fromAstNode = constructorDelegationCall,
 408→                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 409→
 410→                // Leading annotations and comments should be indented at same level as constructor itself
 411→                if (fromAstNode != node.nextLeaf()) {
 412→                    startIndentContext(
 413→                        fromAstNode = node,
 414→                        toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 415→                        childIndent = "",
 416→                    )
 417→                }
 418→            }
 419→    }
 420→
 421→    private fun visitIf(node: ASTNode) {
 422→        var nextToAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 423→        node
 424→            .findChildByType(ELSE)
 425→            ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 426→                nextToAstNode =
 427→                    startIndentContext(
 428→                        fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 429→                        toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 430→                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 431→            }
 432→
 433→        node
 434→            .findChildByType(THEN)
 435→            ?.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 436→            ?.nextLeaf()
 437→            ?.let { nodeAfterThenBlock ->
 438→                nextToAstNode =
 439→                    startIndentContext(
 440→                        fromAstNode = nodeAfterThenBlock,
 441→                        toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 442→                        childIndent = "",
 443→                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 444→            }
 445→        node
 446→            .findChildByType(RPAR)
 447→            ?.nextCodeLeaf()
 448→            ?.let { nodeAfterConditionBlock ->
 449→                nextToAstNode =
 450→                    startIndentContext(
 451→                        fromAstNode = nodeAfterConditionBlock,
 452→                        toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 453→                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 454→            }
 455→        startIndentContext(
 456→            fromAstNode = node,
 457→            toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 458→            lastChildIndent = "", // No indent for the RPAR
 459→        )
 460→    }
 461→
 462→    private fun visitLbrace(node: ASTNode) {
 463→        // Outer indent context
 464→        val rbrace =
 465→            requireNotNull(
 466→                node.nextSibling { it.elementType == RBRACE },
 467→            ) { "Can not find matching rbrace" }
 468→        startIndentContext(
 469→            fromAstNode = node,
 470→            toAstNode = rbrace,
 471→            firstChildIndent = "",
 472→            lastChildIndent = "",
 473→        )
 474→
 475→        // Inner indent context in reversed order
 476→        node
 477→            .treeParent
 478→            ?.takeIf { it.elementType == FUNCTION_LITERAL }
 479→            ?.findChildByType(ARROW)
 480→            ?.let { arrow ->
 481→                startIndentContext(
 482→                    fromAstNode = arrow,
 483→                    toAstNode = rbrace,
 484→                    lastChildIndent = "",
 485→                )
 486→                startIndentContext(
 487→                    fromAstNode = node,
 488→                    toAstNode = arrow.prevCodeLeaf()!!,
 489→                    childIndent = arrow.calculateIndentOfFunctionLiteralParameters(),
 490→                )
 491→            }
 492→    }
 493→
 494→    private fun ASTNode.calculateIndentOfFunctionLiteralParameters() =
 495→        if (isFirstParameterOfFunctionLiteralPrecededByNewLine()) {
 496→            // val fieldExample =
 497→            //      LongNameClass {
 498→            //              paramA,
 499→            //              paramB,
 500→            //              paramC ->
 501→            //          ClassB(paramA, paramB, paramC)
 502→            //      }
 503→            indentConfig.indent.repeat(2)
 504→        } else {
 505→            // Allow default IntelliJ IDEA formatting:
 506→            // val fieldExample =
 507→            //     LongNameClass { paramA,
 508→            //                     paramB,
 509→            //                     paramC ->
 510→            //         ClassB(paramA, paramB, paramC)
 511→            //     }
 512→            // val fieldExample =
 513→            //     someFunction(
 514→            //         1,
 515→            //         2,
 516→            //     ) { paramA,
 517→            //         paramB,
 518→            //         paramC ->
 519→            //         ClassB(paramA, paramB, paramC)
 520→            //     }
 521→            this
 522→                .takeIf { it.isPartOf(CALL_EXPRESSION) }
 523→                ?.treeParent
 524→                ?.leaves(false)
 525→                ?.takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
 526→                ?.sumOf { it.textLength }
 527→                ?.plus(2) // need to add spaces to compensate for "{ "
 528→                ?.let { length -> " ".repeat(length) }
 529→                ?: indentConfig.indent.repeat(2)
 530→        }
 531→
 532→    private fun ASTNode.isFirstParameterOfFunctionLiteralPrecededByNewLine() =
 533→        parent(FUNCTION_LITERAL)
 534→            ?.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST)
 535→            ?.prevSibling { it.textContains('\n') } != null
 536→
 537→    private fun visitLparBeforeCondition(node: ASTNode) {
 538→        startIndentContext(
 539→            fromAstNode = requireNotNull(node.nextLeaf()), // Allow to pickup whitespace before condition
 540→            toAstNode = requireNotNull(node.nextCodeSibling()).lastChildLeafOrSelf(), // Ignore whitespace after condition but before rpar
 541→            nodeIndent = currentIndent() + indentConfig.indent,
 542→            childIndent = "",
 543→        )
 544→    }
 545→
 546→    private fun visitValueParameter(node: ASTNode) {
 547→        // Inner indent contexts in reversed order
 548→        var nextToAstNode: ASTNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 549→        node
 550→            .findChildByType(EQ)
 551→            ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 552→                nextToAstNode =
 553→                    startIndentContext(
 554→                        fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 555→                        toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 556→                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 557→            }
 558→
 559→        if (codeStyle == ktlint_official) {
 560→            // Deviate from standard IntelliJ IDEA formatting to allow formatting below:
 561→            //     fun process(
 562→            //         aVariableWithAVeryLongName:
 563→            //             TypeWithAVeryLongNameThatDoesNotFitOnSameLineAsTheVariableName
 564→            //     ): List<Output>
 565→            node
 566→                .findChildByType(COLON)
 567→                ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 568→                    nextToAstNode =
 569→                        startIndentContext(
 570→                            fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 571→                            toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 572→                        ).prevCodeLeaf()
 573→                }
 574→        }
 575→
 576→        // Leading annotations and comments should be indented at same level as constructor itself
 577→        val fromAstNode = node.skipLeadingWhitespaceCommentsAndAnnotations()
 578→        if (fromAstNode != node.firstChildNode &&
 579→            node.prevSibling { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() } == null &&
 580→            node == node.treeParent.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER)
 581→        ) {
 582→            nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 583→                fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 584→                toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 585→            ).fromASTNode.prevLeaf { !it.isWhiteSpace() }!!
 586→        } else {
 587→            startIndentContext(
 588→                fromAstNode = node,
 589→                toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 590→                childIndent = "",
 591→            )
 592→        }
 593→    }
 594→
 595→    private fun visitFun(node: ASTNode) {
 596→        // Inner indent contexts in reversed order
 597→        var nextToAstNode: ASTNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 598→        val eqOrBlock =
 599→            node.findChildByType(EQ)
 600→                ?: node.findChildByType(BLOCK)
 601→        eqOrBlock?.let {
 602→            nextToAstNode =
 603→                startIndentContext(
 604→                    fromAstNode = eqOrBlock,
 605→                    toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 606→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 607→        }
 608→
 609→        node
 610→            .findChildByType(TYPE_REFERENCE)
 611→            ?.let { typeReference ->
 612→                nextToAstNode =
 613→                    startIndentContext(
 614→                        fromAstNode = typeReference.getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces(),
 615→                        toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 616→                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 617→            }
 618→
 619→        // Leading annotations and comments should be indented at same level as function itself
 620→        startIndentContext(
 621→            fromAstNode = node,
 622→            toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 623→            childIndent = "",
 624→        )
 625→    }

 627→    private fun visitClass(node: ASTNode) {
 628→        // Inner indent contexts in reversed order
 629→        var nextToAstNode: ASTNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 630→        node
 631→            .findChildByType(WHERE_KEYWORD)
 632→            ?.let { where ->
 633→                val typeConstraintList =
 634→                    requireNotNull(
 635→                        where.nextCodeSibling(),
 636→                    ) { "Can not find code sibling after WHERE in CLASS" }
 637→                require(
 638→                    typeConstraintList.elementType == TYPE_CONSTRAINT_LIST,
 639→                ) { "Code sibling after WHERE in CLASS is not a TYPE_CONSTRAINT_LIST" }
 640→                nextToAstNode =
 641→                    startIndentContext(
 642→                        fromAstNode = where.getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces(),
 643→                        toAstNode = typeConstraintList.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 644→                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 645→            }
 646→
 647→        val primaryConstructor = node.findChildByType(PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR)
 648→        val containsConstructorKeyword = primaryConstructor?.findChildByType(CONSTRUCTOR_KEYWORD) != null
 649→        if (codeStyle == ktlint_official && primaryConstructor != null && containsConstructorKeyword) {
 650→            // Contrary to the default IntelliJ IDEA formatter, ident both constructor and super type list as follows:
 651→            //     class Foo
 652→            //        @Bar1 @Bar2
 653→            //        constructor(
 654→            //            foo1: Foo1,
 655→            //            foo2: Foo2,
 656→            //        ) : Foobar1(
 657→            //                "foobar1",
 658→            //                "foobar2",
 659→            //            ),
 660→            //            FooBar2,
 661→            val superTypeList = node.findChildByType(SUPER_TYPE_LIST)
 662→            nextToAstNode =
 663→                startIndentContext(
 664→                    fromAstNode = primaryConstructor.getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces(),
 665→                    toAstNode =
 666→                        superTypeList
 667→                            ?.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 668→                            ?: nextToAstNode,
 669→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 670→
 671→            superTypeList
 672→                ?.findChildByType(COMMA)
 673→                ?.let { comma ->
 674→                    // In case of a multiline primary constructor the first super type is merged with the closing parenthesis of the
 675→                    // constructor. The start of the super type list does not activate the indent because it is not preceded by a newline.
 676→                    // To fix this, the super type entries on the next line (e.g. after the comma) have to be double indented.
 677→                    // Allow:
 678→                    //     class Foo(
 679→                    //         val bar1: Bar,
 680→                    //         val bar2: Bar,
 681→                    //     ) : FooBar(
 682→                    //             bar1,
 683→                    //             bar2
 684→                    //         ),
 685→                    //         BarFoo1
 686→                    val prevCodeLeaf =
 687→                        startIndentContext(
 688→                            fromAstNode = comma,
 689→                            toAstNode = superTypeList.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 690→                            childIndent = indentConfig.indent.repeat(2),
 691→                        ).prevCodeLeaf()
 692→                    startIndentContext(
 693→                        fromAstNode = primaryConstructor.getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces(),
 694→                        toAstNode = prevCodeLeaf,
 695→                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 696→                }
 697→        } else {
 698→            node
 699→                .findChildByType(SUPER_TYPE_LIST)
 700→                ?.let { superTypeList ->
 701→                    nextToAstNode =
 702→                        startIndentContext(
 703→                            fromAstNode = superTypeList.getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces(),
 704→                            toAstNode = superTypeList.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 705→                        ).prevCodeLeaf()
 706→                }
 707→        }
 708→
 709→        // Leading annotations and comments should be indented at same level as class itself
 710→        startIndentContext(
 711→            fromAstNode = node,
 712→            toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 713→            childIndent = "",
 714→        )
 715→    }

 738→    private fun visitBinaryExpression(node: ASTNode) {
 739→        if (isPartOfBinaryExpressionWrappedInCondition(node)) {
 740→            // Complex binary expression are nested in such a way that the indent context of the condition
 741→            // wrapper is not the last node on the stack
 742→            val conditionIndentContext =
 743→                indentContextStack.last { it.fromASTNode.elementType != BINARY_EXPRESSION }
 744→            // Create new indent context for the remainder (operator and right-hand side) of the binary expression
 745→            startIndentContext(
 746→                fromAstNode = node.findChildByType(OPERATION_REFERENCE)!!,
 747→                toAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 748→                nodeIndent = conditionIndentContext.nodeIndent,
 749→                childIndent = conditionIndentContext.childIndent,
 750→            )
 751→            startIndentContext(node.firstChildNode)
 752→        } else if (node.treeParent?.elementType != BINARY_EXPRESSION ||
 753→            node.findChildByType(OPERATION_REFERENCE)?.firstChildNode?.elementType == ELVIS
 754→        ) {
 755→            startIndentContext(node)
 756→        }
 757→    }

 959→    private fun ASTNode.skipLeadingWhitespaceCommentsAndAnnotations(): ASTNode {
 960→        require(elementType == SECONDARY_CONSTRUCTOR || elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER)
 961→        return findChildByType(MODIFIER_LIST)
 962→            ?.let { modifierList ->
 963→                modifierList
 964→                    .children()
 965→                    .firstOrNull { !it.isWhiteSpace() && !it.isPartOfComment() && it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
 966→                    ?: modifierList.nextCodeSibling()
 967→            }
 968→            ?: children().firstOrNull { !it.isWhiteSpace() && !it.isPartOfComment() }
 969→            ?: this
 970→    }
 971→
 972→    private fun ASTNode.getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces(): ASTNode {
 973→        var fromAstNode: ASTNode? = this
 974→        while (fromAstNode?.prevLeaf() != null &&
 975→            (fromAstNode.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpace() || fromAstNode.prevLeaf()?.isPartOfComment() == true)
 976→        ) {
 977→            fromAstNode = fromAstNode.prevLeaf()
 978→        }
 979→        return fromAstNode!!
 980→    }

 982→    private fun isPartOfBinaryExpressionWrappedInCondition(node: ASTNode) =
 983→        node
 984→            .parents()
 985→            .takeWhile { it.elementType == BINARY_EXPRESSION || it.elementType == CONDITION }
 986→            .lastOrNull()
 987→            ?.elementType == CONDITION

 989→    private fun currentIndent() =
 990→        indentContextStack
 991→            .peekLast()
 992→            .indent()
 993→
 994→    private fun startIndentContext(
 995→        fromAstNode: ASTNode,
 996→        toAstNode: ASTNode = fromAstNode.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 997→        nodeIndent: String = currentIndent(),
 998→        childIndent: String = indentConfig.indent,
 999→        firstChildIndent: String = childIndent,
1000→        lastChildIndent: String = childIndent,
1001→        activated: Boolean = false,
1002→    ): IndentContext =
1003→        IndentContext(
1004→            fromASTNode = fromAstNode,
1005→            toASTNode = toAstNode,
1006→            nodeIndent = nodeIndent,
1007→            firstChildIndent = firstChildIndent,
1008→            childIndent = childIndent,
1009→            lastChildIndent = lastChildIndent,
1010→            activated = activated,
1011→        ).also { newIndentContext ->
1012→            LOGGER.trace {
1013→                val nodeIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(newIndentContext.nodeIndent)
1014→                val childIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(newIndentContext.childIndent)
1015→                "Create new indent context (same as parent) with level ($nodeIndentLevel, $childIndentLevel) for " +
1016→                    "${fromAstNode.elementType}: ${newIndentContext.nodes}"
1017→            }
1018→            indentContextStack.addLast(newIndentContext)
1019→        }
1020→
1021→    override fun afterVisitChildNodes(
1022→        node: ASTNode,
1023→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
1024→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
1025→    ) {
1026→        while (indentContextStack.peekLast()?.toASTNode == node) {
1027→            LOGGER.trace {
1028→                val indentContext = indentContextStack.peekLast()
1029→                val nodeIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(indentContext.nodeIndent)
1030→                val childIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(indentContext.childIndent)
1031→                "Remove indent context with level ($nodeIndentLevel, $childIndentLevel) for ${indentContext.fromASTNode.elementType}: " +
1032→                    "${indentContext.nodes}"
1033→            }
1034→            indentContextStack
1035→                .removeLast()
1036→                .also {
1037→                    LOGGER.trace {
1038→                        val indentContext = indentContextStack.peekLast()
1039→                        val nodeIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(indentContext.nodeIndent)
1040→                        val childIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(indentContext.childIndent)
1041→                        "Last indent context with level ($nodeIndentLevel, $childIndentLevel) for " +
1042→                            "${indentContext.fromASTNode.elementType}: ${indentContext.nodes}"
1043→                    }
1044→                }
1045→        }
1046→    }
1047→
1048→    override fun afterLastNode() {
1049→        require(indentContextStack.isEmpty()) {
1050→            indentContextStack
1051→                .joinToString(prefix = "Stack should be empty:\n\t", separator = "\n\t") { it.toString() }
1052→        }
1053→    }
1054→
1055→    private fun visitNewLineIndentation(
1056→        node: ASTNode,
1057→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
1058→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
1059→    ) {
1060→        if (node.ignoreIndent()) {
1061→            return
1062→        }
1063→
1064→        val normalizedNodeIndent = node.normalizedIndent(emit)
1065→        val expectedIndentation = node.expectedIndent()
1066→        val text = node.text
1067→        val nodeIndent = text.substringAfterLast("\n")
1068→        if (nodeIndent != normalizedNodeIndent || normalizedNodeIndent != expectedIndentation) {
1069→            if (normalizedNodeIndent != expectedIndentation) {
1070→                emit(
1071→                    node.startOffset + text.length - nodeIndent.length,
1072→                    "Unexpected indentation (${normalizedNodeIndent.length}) (should be ${expectedIndentation.length})",
1073→                    true,
1074→                )
1075→            } else {
1076→                // Indentation was at correct level but contained invalid indent characters. This violation has already
1077→                // been emitted.
1078→            }
1079→            LOGGER.trace {
1080→                "Line $line: " + (if (!autoCorrect) "would have " else "") + "changed indentation to ${expectedIndentation.length} " +
1081→                    "(from ${normalizedNodeIndent.length}) for ${node.elementType}: ${node.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()}"
1082→            }
1083→            if (autoCorrect) {
1084→                (node as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(
1085→                    text.substringBeforeLast("\n") + "\n" + expectedIndentation,
1086→                )
1087→            }
1088→        } else {
1089→            node.processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded()
1090→        }
1091→    }
1092→
1093→    private fun ASTNode.ignoreIndent(): Boolean {
1094→        val nextLeaf = nextLeaf()
1095→        if (text.endsWith("\n") && nextLeaf.isStartOfRawStringLiteral()) {
1096→            processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded()

1140→    private fun ASTNode.normalizedIndent(emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit): String {

1156→            TAB -> {

1158→                val nodeIndentWithoutAcceptableTrailingSpaces = nodeIndent.removeSuffix(acceptableTrailingSpaces)

1200→
1201→                TYPE_CONSTRAINT -> {
1202→                    // 6 spaces (length of "where" keyword plus a separator space) to indent type constraints as below:
1203→                    //    where A1 : RecyclerView.Adapter<V1>,
1204→                    //               A1 : ComposableAdapter.ViewTypeProvider,
1205→                    TYPE_CONSTRAINT_CONTINUATION_INDENT
1206→                }

1208→                else -> ""

1212→            return acceptableTrailingSpaces

1234→    private data class IndentContext(
1235→        /**
1236→         * The node on which the indent context starts.
1237→         */
1238→        val fromASTNode: ASTNode,
1239→        /**
1240→         * The node at which the indent context ends. If null, then the context ends at the last child leaf of the node
1241→         * on which the indent context starts.
1242→         */
1243→        val toASTNode: ASTNode = fromASTNode.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
1244→        /**
1245→         * Cumulative indentation for the node. Normally this should be equal to a multiple of the
1246→         * 'indentConfig.indentStyle' to ensure a consistent indentation style.
1247→         */
1248→        val nodeIndent: String,
1249→        /**
1250→         * Additional indentation for first child node. Normally this should be equal to the 'indentConfig.indent' to
1251→         * ensure a consistent indentation style. In very limited cases when the default indentation is set to 'tab' it
1252→         * is still needed to adjust the last indentation using spaces.
1253→         */
1254→        val firstChildIndent: String,
1255→        /**
1256→         * Additional indentation for child nodes. Normally this should be equal to the 'indentConfig.indent' to ensure
1257→         * a consistent indentation style. In very limited cases when the default indentation is set to 'tab' it is
1258→         * still needed to adjust the last indentation using spaces.
1259→         */
1260→        val childIndent: String,
1261→        /**
1262→         * Additional indentation for last child node. Normally this should be equal to the 'indentConfig.indent' to
1263→         * ensure a consistent indentation style. In very limited cases when the default indentation is set to 'tab' it
1264→         * is still needed to adjust the last indentation using spaces.
1265→         */
1266→        val lastChildIndent: String,
1267→        /**
1268→         * True when the indentation level of this context is activated
1269→         */
1270→        val activated: Boolean = false,
1271→    ) {
1272→        val nodes: String
1273→            get() =
1274→                fromASTNode
1275→                    .prevLeaf() // The 'fromAstNode' itself needs to be returned by '.leaves()' call as well
1276→                    ?.leaves()
1277→                    .orEmpty()
1278→                    .takeWhile {
1279→                        // The 'toAstNode' itself needs to be included as well
1280→                        it != toASTNode.nextLeaf()
1281→                    }
1282→                    .joinToString(separator = "") { it.text }
1283→                    .textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()
1284→
1285→        fun indent() =
1286→            if (activated) {
1287→                nodeIndent + childIndent
1288→            } else {
1289→                nodeIndent
1290→            }
1291→
1292→        fun prevCodeLeaf() = fromASTNode.prevCodeLeaf()!!
1293→    }
1294→}

1298→private fun String.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline(): String {
1299→    val (prefix, suffix) =
1300→        if (this.all { it.isWhitespace() }) {
1301→            Pair("[", "]")
1302→        } else {
1303→            Pair("", "")
1304→        }
1305→    return prefix
1306→        .plus(
1307→            this
1308→                .replace("\t", "\\t")
1309→                .replace("\n", "\\n"),
1310→        ).plus(suffix)
1311→}

1313→private class StringTemplateIndenter(
1314→    private val codeStyle: CodeStyleValue,
1315→    private val indentConfig: IndentConfig,
1316→) {

1318→        expectedIndent: String,

1325→            .let { it.psi as KtStringTemplateExpression }
1326→            .takeIf { it.isFollowedByTrimIndent() || it.isFollowedByTrimMargin() }

1329→                if (node.containsMixedIndentationCharacters()) {
1330→                    // It can not be determined with certainty how mixed indentation characters should be interpreted.
1331→                    // The trimIndent function handles tabs and spaces equally (one tabs equals one space) while the user
1332→                    // might expect that the tab size in the indentation is more than one space.
1333→                    emit(
1334→                        node.startOffset,
1335→                        "Indentation of multiline string should not contain both tab(s) and space(s)",
1336→                        false,
1337→                    )

1340→
1341→                val prefixLength = node.getCommonPrefixLength()

1344→                    if (codeStyle == ktlint_official && node.isRawStringLiteralReturnInFunctionBodyBlock()) {

1346→                        //   fun foo(): String {
1347→                        //       return """
1348→                        //           some text
1349→                        //           """.trimIndent
1350→                        //   }
1351→                        node
1352→                            .indent(false)
1353→                            .plus(indentConfig.indent)
1354→                    } else if (codeStyle == ktlint_official && node.isRawStringLiteralFunctionBodyExpression()) {
1355→                        // Allow:
1356→                        //   fun foo(
1357→                        //       bar: String
1358→                        //   ) = """
1359→                        //       $bar
1360→                        //       """.trimIndent
1361→                        node
1362→                            .indent(false)
1363→                            .plus(indentConfig.indent)
1364→                    } else if (prevLeaf?.text == "\n") {
1365→                        // In case the opening quotes are placed at the start of the line, then the closing quotes
1366→                        // should have no indent as well.
1367→                        ""
1368→                    } else {
1369→                        expectedIndent
1370→                    }
1371→                node.children()
1372→                    .forEach {
1373→                        if (it.prevLeaf()?.text == "\n" &&
1374→                            (
1375→                                it.isLiteralStringTemplateEntry() ||
1376→                                    it.isVariableStringTemplateEntry() ||
1377→                                    it.isClosingQuote()
1378→                            )
1379→                        ) {
1380→                            val (actualIndent, actualContent) =
1381→                                if (it.isIndentBeforeClosingQuote()) {
1382→                                    it.text.splitIndentAt(it.text.length)
1383→                                } else if (it.isVariableStringTemplateEntry() && it.isFirstNonBlankElementOnLine()) {
1384→                                    it.getFirstElementOnSameLine().text.splitIndentAt(correctedExpectedIndent.length)
1385→                                } else {
1386→                                    it.text.splitIndentAt(prefixLength)
1387→                                }
1388→                            if (indentConfig.containsUnexpectedIndentChar(actualIndent)) {
1389→                                val offsetFirstWrongIndentChar =
1390→                                    indentConfig.indexOfFirstUnexpectedIndentChar(actualIndent)

1392→                                    it.startOffset + offsetFirstWrongIndentChar,
1393→                                    "Unexpected '${indentConfig.unexpectedIndentCharDescription}' character(s) in margin of multiline " +
1394→                                        "string",
1395→                                    true,
1396→                                )
1397→                                if (autoCorrect) {
1398→                                    (it.firstChildNode as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(
1399→                                        correctedExpectedIndent + actualContent,
1400→                                    )
1401→                                }
1402→                            } else if (actualIndent != correctedExpectedIndent && it.isIndentBeforeClosingQuote()) {
1403→                                // It is a deliberate choice not to fix the indents inside the string literal except the line which only contains
1404→                                // the closing quotes.
1405→                                emit(
1406→                                    it.startOffset,
1407→                                    "Unexpected indent of multiline string closing quotes",
1408→                                    true,
1409→                                )
1410→                                if (autoCorrect) {
1411→                                    if (it.firstChildNode == null) {

1414→                                        )
1415→                                    } else {
1416→                                        (it.firstChildNode as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(
1417→                                            correctedExpectedIndent + actualContent,
1418→                                        )
1419→                                    }
1420→                                }
1421→                            }
1422→                        }
1423→                    }
1424→            }
1425→    }

private fun indentIsExpression(node: ASTNode) {
    val op = node.findChildByType(OPERATION_REFERENCE)
    if (op != null) {
        startIndentContext(
            fromAstNode = op.nextCodeSibling() ?: node.firstChildNode,
            toAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
            childIndent = indentConfig.indent
        )
    } else {
        startIndentContext(node)
    }
}

private fun indentPrefixExpression(node: ASTNode) {
    val op = node.findChildByType(OPERATION_REFERENCE)
    if (op != null) {
        startIndentContext(
            fromAstNode = op,
            toAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
            childIndent = indentConfig.indent
        )
    } else {
        startIndentContext(node)
    }
}

 91→    val op = node.findChildByType(OPERATION_REFERENCE)
 92→    if (op != null) {
 93→        startIndentContext(
 94→            fromAstNode = op.nextCodeSibling() ?: node.firstChildNode,
 95→            toAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 96→            childIndent = indentConfig.indent
 97→        )
 98→    } else {
 99→        startIndentContext(node)
100→    }
101→}

108→            toAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
109→            childIndent = indentConfig.indent
110→        )
111→    } else {
112→        startIndentContext(node)
113→    }

// Add these two helper functions before the closing brace of IndentationRule:

private fun indentIsExpression(node: ASTNode) {
    val op = node.findChildByType(OPERATION_REFERENCE)
    if (op != null) {
        startIndentContext(
            fromAstNode = op.nextCodeSibling() ?: node.firstChildNode,
            toAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
            childIndent = indentConfig.indent
        )
    } else {
        startIndentContext(node)
    }
}

private fun indentPrefixExpression(node: ASTNode) {
    val op = node.findChildByType(OPERATION_REFERENCE)
    if (op != null) {
        startIndentContext(
            fromAstNode = op,
            toAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
            childIndent = indentConfig.indent
        )
    } else {
        startIndentContext(node)
    }
}
}

    private fun indentIsExpression(node: ASTNode) {
        val op = node.findChildByType(OPERATION_REFERENCE)
        if (op != null) {
            startIndentContext(
                fromAstNode = op.nextCodeSibling() ?: node.firstChildNode,
                toAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
                childIndent = indentConfig.indent
            )
        } else {
            startIndentContext(node)
        }
    }

    private fun indentPrefixExpression(node: ASTNode) {

        }
